# hetzner_reset (Data Source)

Read reset options for a Hetzner dedicated server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hetzner_reset" "example" {
  server_number = 12345
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_number` (Number) The server number.

### Read-Only

- `operating_status` (String) Current server operating status.
- `server_ip` (String) Server main IPv4 address.
- `server_ipv6_net` (String) Server IPv6 network.
- `type` (List of String) Available reset types.
